## 🎯 Quick Start

### For Reading:
```bash
# Open the consolidated document
cat COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md | less

# Or open in your favorite editor
code COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md
```

### For Searching:
```bash
# Search for specific topics
grep -n "Groq API" COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md
grep -n "Security" COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md
grep -n "Rate Limit" COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md
```

### For Navigation:
```bash
# View the index first
cat COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION_INDEX.md
```

## 🎯 Key Highlights

### Technical Innovation:
- ✅ Multi-agent AI (3 specialized agents)
- ✅ Cost-effective ($0.003/interview)
- ✅ Intelligent routing (70% cheap, 30% expensive)
- ✅ Vector DB caching (10-20% savings)
- ✅ Algorithmic topic tracking

### Security:
- ✅ Fullscreen enforcement
- ✅ Copy/paste prevention
- ✅ Tab switching detection
- ✅ Integrity checking
- ✅ AI answer detection (planned)

### Scalability:
- ✅ 500 interviews/day (free tier)
- ✅ Async evaluation (planned)
- ✅ Offline support (planned)
- ✅ Horizontal scaling ready

## 💡 Tips

### Searching the Document:
```bash
# Find all mentions of "Groq"
grep -n "Groq" COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md

# Find all code blocks
grep -n "```" COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md

# Find all diagrams
grep -n "┌─" COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md
```

### Extracting Sections:
```bash
# Extract lines 1-1500 (System Architecture)
sed -n '1,1500p' COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md > system_architecture.md

# Extract lines 5001-6000 (Security Features)
sed -n '5001,6000p' COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md > security_features.md
```

### Converting to PDF:
```bash
# Using pandoc (if installed)
pandoc COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md -o COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.pdf

# Using markdown-pdf (if installed)
markdown-pdf COMPLETE_DOCUMENTATION.md
```
